zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard於大約1236年出生在法國布列塔尼時，她的父親Josselin II de la Roche Bernard37歲，母親Mahaud de MONFORT24歲。她於大約1266年與Alain VI de Rohan結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1304年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard于大约1236年出生在法国布列塔尼时，她的父亲Josselin II de la Roche Bernard37岁，母亲Mahaud de MONFORT24岁。她于大约1266年与Alain VI de Rohan结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1304年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Thomasse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Emile.
Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of Italian   Tomasino  .
French (Thomassié): derivative of the personal name Thomas .

variants.name: Tomasino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Attilio, Grazia, Rocco, Sal, Vincenzo, Vito.  Spanish Angel, Cesar, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Luis, Vidal.
Italian: from a pet form of the personal name Tomaso, an equivalent of Thomas .

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard was born about 1236, in Brittany, France, her father, Josselin II de la Roche Bernard, was 37 and her mother, Mahaud de MONFORT, was 24. She married Alain VI de Rohan about 1266. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1304, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard est née environ 1236, à Bretagne, France, son père, Josselin II de la Roche Bernard, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mahaud de MONFORT, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Alain VI de Rohan environ 1266. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1304, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard um 1236 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Josselin II de la Roche Bernard 37 und ihre Mutter Mahaud de MONFORT 24. Sie hat um 1266 Alain VI de Rohan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1304 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard è nata il circa 1236 nel Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Josselin II de la Roche Bernard, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mahaud de MONFORT, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Alain VI de Rohan circa 1266. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1304, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasse de La Roche-Bernardが約1236年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Josselin II de la Roche Bernardは37歳，母Mahaud de MONFORTは24歳であった。約1266年にAlain VI de Rohanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1304年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard(이)가 대략 1236년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Josselin II de la Roche Bernard(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mahaud de MONFORT(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1266년 Alain VI de Rohan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1304년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1236–Abt 1304: tany ho any amin'ny 1236–tany ho any amin'ny 1304

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Josselin II de la Roche Bernard, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mahaud de MONFORT, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Alain VI de Rohan aproximadamente 1266. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1304, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard родилась около 1236 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Josselin II de la Roche Bernard было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaud de MONFORT, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain VI de Rohan около 1266 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1304 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

sm.about 1236–Abt 1304: e tusa o le 1236–e tusa o le 1304

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard nació aproximadamente 1236, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Josselin II de la Roche Bernard, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mahaud de MONFORT, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alain VI de Rohan aproximadamente 1266. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1304, a la edad de 70 años.
